name: msm-archive-audit
description: Audits mainstream media archives by comparing historical predictions and narratives with actual historical outcomes.

steps.name: archive-search
steps.prompt: Search mainstream media archives (NYT, WSJ, BBC, etc.) for predictions and core narratives regarding {{input}} from the specific historical period requested.

steps.name: outcome-verification
steps.prompt: Gather factual data and historical records on what actually transpired regarding the topic: {{input}}. Use primary historical sources and statistical data.

steps.name: gap-analysis
steps.prompt: Compare the historical narratives: {{historical_narratives}} with the actual outcomes: {{actual_outcomes}}. Identify specific instances of accurate foresight, failed predictions, or systemic bias in the original reporting.

steps.name: accountability-report
steps.prompt: Synthesize the findings into an 'Accountability Audit'. Score the media outlets on their predictive accuracy and narrative integrity for this specific topic.
